ParaExperts.meta_desc: Set it up once. Your clients get 24/7 answers with your protocol. Free for 14 days.
ParaExperts.hero_title:
Your AI. For every client.
At the same time.
ParaExperts.hero_subtitle: Set it up once. Your clients get 24/7 answers with your protocol. You scale, without splitting yourself.
ParaExperts.section_steps_title: Three steps to scale your methodology.
ParaExperts.closing_title:
Built for those with a method.
Not for those who improvise.
ParaExperts.closing_desc: MyNutri doesn't dictate the rules — it executes yours. For every client. At the same time.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_1_desc: yourname.mynutri.pro — for your client, it's 100% your brand and your technology.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_2_desc: Trivial questions go to the AI; your time goes to what only you can do.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_3_desc: It doesn't make things up, doesn't improvise, doesn't leave your methodology.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_4_desc: "24/7 access to my exclusive AI" justifies and elevates your price.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_5_desc: Without losing quality, technical precision, or your identity.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_1_desc: Question at the grocery store, gym, or midnight: answered.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_2_desc: No waiting for a WhatsApp reply or your next appointment.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_3_desc: No guesswork, no internet, just the expert's protocol.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_4_desc: Food substitution, restaurant menu, label reading — right now.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_5_desc: Less doubt, fewer mistakes, more plan execution.
ParaExperts.step_1_desc: In your own words, you define the protocol: method, priorities, response style.
ParaExperts.step_2_desc: Your ecosystem ready in minutes. Exclusive subdomain, management panel, personalized invites.
ParaExperts.step_3_desc: Your clients access with the invite link. The AI answers for you — without you being there.
